from source import sqrt
import math


def test_sqrt_2_epsilon_0_01():
    """sqrt(2, 0.01) should converge to approximately sqrt(2) ≈ 1.414.
    
    Bug: convergence check uses abs(x - approx) but should use abs(x - approx ** 2).
    This causes the loop to hang indefinitely because abs(2 - sqrt(2)) ≈ 0.586 
    will never be ≤ 0.01.
    """
    result = sqrt(2, 0.01)
    
    expected = math.sqrt(2)
    assert abs(result - expected) < 0.01, \
        f"sqrt(2, 0.01) returned {result}, expected within 0.01 of {expected}"
